inventoryNotes: Fail-closed starter inventory only. Confirm every manual-copy target before setting inventoryComplete to true.
Citrix server names are not yet documented in this repository and must be added to requiredServers and targets.
Confirm production processor paths, task names, configuration paths, and GovCloud region from the deployment runbooks.
Excluded per brief Scope: cloud services (gateway services, MERA - VESMERA01, VESOMSVEMS01/02) already have standard deployment processes; joining them to the Git release discipline is later work.
Excluded per brief Scope: database objects (stored procedures, triggers, views) are a planned fast follow, outside the two-week window.

targets.note: DBQ is documented on VESEMSEGRESS02/03; create one confirmed entry per deployed copy.
